subject: english
learning_objectives: Restate ideas in clearer or shorter language

sections.heading: Definition
sections.content: A paraphrase is a restatement of a text in different words, often in a shorter or clearer way, in order to clarify meaning.

sections.heading: Source Passage Notes
sections.content: The note paraphrases a passage on marriage and family, stating points about marriage in Nigerian society, former views of marriage as sacred, the main ways of contracting marriage, and the movement from polygamy toward monogamy.
